---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
What would you like to see added or improved?

## Which district / module does this affect?
- **District**: (e.g. All districts, Mandya, or suggest a new district)
- **Module / Section**: (e.g. Elections, Health, new: Flood Alerts)

## Why is this useful for citizens?
How would this help people in your district?

## Do you have a data source?
If you know a public government source (data.gov.in, state portal, etc.) that has this data, please share the link.

## Additional context
Any mockups, screenshots, or examples of similar features elsewhere.
